content.en:
Luo Feng's matter was just a small episode for Ye Tian, and he couldn't even attract his attention.

The members of the Dark God Society are very complex, and they have secretly recruited geniuses of many races, and even some of the top big forces may have spies of the Dark God Society.

Even if it is the current Terran, I am afraid that many people are peripheral members of the Dark God Society, and it is difficult to prohibit this kind of thing, after all, the territory of the Terran is too big, and the number of human beings is too large to manage.

But as long as the upper echelons of the human race are not invaded by the Dark God Society, he doesn't have to worry about other things.

......

"After 500 million years of hard work, the three Origin Divine Powers have been created, and my strength has also improved a lot, far from being comparable to the original, and now there is only one last step left, the three Origin Divine Powers will be initially fused into a Origin Divine Power containing the essence and spirit, and then the essence and spirit will be completely integrated!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In fact, he could also directly skip the three Origin Divine Powers and directly create a Origin Divine Power that contained the three aspects of Essence, Qi and God from scratch, but it was almost unrealistic, and the difficulty increased by more than 10,000 times.

It would have been very difficult to break the boundary, and if you improve it 10,000 times, it is equivalent to having no hope at all.

At this time.

The three origin divine powers were created, and Ye Tian obviously sensed that his spirit spirit had broken the boundary in half a step, and the spirit of the whole person had improved a lot, but he still hadn't completely broken the boundary.

Now, he needs to combine the three Origin Divine Powers according to the changes in his own essence and spirit, and then create a Origin Divine Power that contains the essence and spirit.

Maybe it can't be called the Origin Divine Power, but a cultivation method that integrates the three aspects of essence, qi and spirit!

"If there weren't three Origin Divine Powers to refer to each other, I'm afraid I wouldn't even be able to find a way out at all. Now, I have vaguely witnessed the path of unity of spirit and spirit. "

Ye Tiandao.

He also knew that it would not be easy to complete the last step, and it might take a long time, but he had at least seen the path of unity of spirit and spirit, and saw true hope.

Before, he didn't see any hope at all!

this day.

Ye Tian was in retreat, and a piece of news came out.

The ancestral monument space is about to open!

Prior to this, the ancestral monument space had also been opened many times, but only the top 100 gods of the Divine Generals were allowed to enter it to cultivate and comprehend, and neither the Heavenly Monarch nor the True Monarch could enter it.

But this time is different, the ancestral monument space opens up a space, a world.

One is the space that allows the gods to enter the top hundred, and the other is the world that allows the top 100 heavenly monarchs to enter.

For this, many of the Heavenly Monarchs of the top powers knew about it, because in the later stage, even the True Monarch and True Ancestor could enter the inner world of the Ancestral Monument to participate in enlightenment and cultivation.

It is not surprising that the ancestral world suitable for the Heavenly Monarch has now been opened.

For the top 100 Tianjun on the Tianjun list, this is definitely a big opportunity.

When Ye Tian got this news, he couldn't help but be very happy, because he could use the ancestral tablet world to complete the fusion of the three origin divine powers, and create the origin divine power of the unity of essence and spirit.

"There are still 10,000 years, and the ancestral monument world will be opened, just wait!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

The ancestral monument world is about to open, and the heavenly monarchs at the top of the Heavenly Monarch List are crazy one by one, they all want to enter the top 100, and the top 100 also want to keep their rankings.

However, there is too little time for 10,000 years, and it is difficult to improve any strength at all.

And so, the assassination began!

For example, if the Heavenly Monarch who is ranked 101st on the Heavenly Monarch List can't enter the top 100, he can send someone to kill a few Heavenly Monarchs in the top 100 Heavenly Monarchs on the Heavenly Monarch List, can't he enter?

Under such circumstances, a Heavenly Monarch who was in the top 100 on the Heavenly Monarch List was assassinated, and he really succeeded in assassinating several of them.

But later, these Tianjun hid in the headquarters of the forces one by one and refused to come out again.

Gradually, 10,000 years passed, and the quota was set.

-----------

In front of the ancestral monument.

A famous god general and Heavenly Monarch came here, and Ye Tian also came here.

Ye Tian's arrival attracted the attention of many Heavenly Monarchs and Divine Generals, some of them admired Ye Tian very much, but some people were a little disdainful, thinking that Ye Tian was just like that.

Rumble!!!!

The ancestral monument space opened, and a famous god general and heavenly monarch entered.

Ye Tian also stepped into it and came to a world.

It's a world of birds and flowers, divided into floating islands.

Every day, the Heavenly Monarchs occupy an island, and the Heavenly Monarchs can comprehend and cultivate in this world for 100,000 years.

As soon as he entered here, Ye Tian felt that his soul was excited, and his comprehension had been unimaginably improved.

His comprehension was already against the sky, and he had a super-god-level super-comprehension talent, coupled with the increase in the ancestral tablet world, his comprehension reached an unimaginable level.

"100,000 years, we must succeed!"

Ye Tian sat cross-legged and began to create the Origin Divine Power of the unity of essence and spirit.

As the days passed, the other Heavenly Monarchs had greatly improved, and their strength had improved by leaps and bounds, and even some Heavenly Monarchs had directly comprehended a Chaos Divine Power from Dacheng to the extreme level.

The aura of every Heavenly Monarch was constantly increasing, and some people paid attention to Ye Tian, but found that Ye Tian had not changed anything, as if there was no progress.

Suddenly, some people thought that Ye Tian's potential was exhausted and it was difficult to improve.

Ye Tian really didn't make any progress, because he was creating the Origin Divine Power of the Unity of Essence and Spirit, and if the Divine Power was not successful, there was naturally no improvement.

10,000 years!

20,000 years!

30,000 years!

......

Before you know it, 100,000 years are approaching.

At this time, Ye Tian was at a critical moment.

He was already about to create the Origin Divine Power of the unity of essence and spirit, if someone observed the inside of Ye Tian's body, they would find that Ye Tian's essence and spirit were changing.

A person, although the essence and spirit are related, cannot be fused.

It is impossible for the spirit to transform indefinitely, that is something that does not exist.

But now, some of Ye Tian's essence and spirit are already fused, and they can be constantly transformed.

It's like Ye Tian's soul power has been exhausted, and the chaotic divine power can be transformed into soul power and quickly recover his strength, which seems incredible, but this is one of the effects of the unity of spirit and spirit.

A strong person with the unity of spirit and spirit, as long as the spirit and spirit are not all exhausted, there is no theory of fall, and the combat power will always remain at the peak.

Another few decades have passed.

Ye Tian opened his eyes and laughed.

"Finally it worked!"

He created the Origin Divine Power of the unity of essence and spirit, and accomplished something that Dao Ancestor could not do.

Rumble!!!!

With the exertion of this Origin Divine Power, Ye Tian's body, soul, and chaotic divine power began to completely merge.

Fusion Ichicheng!

Twenty percent!

Fifty percent!

Ten percent!

When completely fused, Ye Tian's essence and spirit continued to transform and grow, and in a short time, it increased by nearly a hundred times, and they could be transformed into each other.

Strong!

Ye Tian felt that he was terrifyingly strong, and he could easily kill his past self.

Of course, this is just an illusion, and a strong spirit does not mean that the combat power has increased many times.

But in terms of combat power, he has improved at least ten times.

"This Origin Divine Power is more like a cultivation Divine Power, let's call it a three-in-one!"

The name is ordinary, but apt.

With the Origin Divine Power of the Three-Element Integration, Ye Tian can already be regarded as a unity of essence and spirit, and there will be no shackles to impact Dao Ancestor in the future.

Moreover, he can be regarded as breaking boundaries.

"Break the curse of the demon's ban, break it for me!"

Ye Tian mobilized the power of the unity of spirit and spirit to impact the shackles in the underworld.

Click!

The shackles were broken, and the demonic forbidden spell mark on Ye Tian's body and soul shattered and dissipated in an instant.

Immediately, Ye Tian began to impact the half-step True Spirit Realm.

But soon, he found that he couldn't break through the realm here, because the ancestral monument space was suppressing him and didn't allow him to break through here.

In desperation, Ye Tian could only choose to give up the breakthrough and wait until he returned to the Void Heaven Hall to break through.

"It's time!"

Ye Tian saw that a famous Heavenly Monarch was forcibly removed, and he was also moved out of the ancestral monument space.

Subsequently, Ye Tian returned to the Void Heaven Hall and began to retreat and impact the half-step True Spirit Realm.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to break through successfully and condense the true spirit.

The true spirit is more like a manifestation of will, similar to itself, equivalent to a kind of will doppelganger, but in fact it is a more advanced existence.

The form of the true spirit is related to the level of the true spirit, under normal circumstances, people condense the illusory true spirit, that is, the lower grade true spirit, the more condensed the true spirit, the higher the level.

And the Supreme True Spirit is already close to the entity state, and the Supreme True Spirit is completely a physical True Spirit.

"The true spirit I have condensed is not only a physical true spirit, but also the light of the true spirit, containing a terrifying majesty, as if above everything!"

Ye Tian looked at the terrifying true spirit in front of him and thought.

Fortunately, the Great Array of the Void Heaven Temple had blocked this vision, otherwise his breakthrough would have shocked countless people.

"Fusion!"

Ye Tian tried to fuse his true spirit.

Soon, the True Spirit and Ye Tian's body began to slowly merge, hiding in the body.

With this fusion, Ye Tian's body began to transform, constantly strengthening, and the body and the true spirit gradually began to be indistinguishable from each other, and the body also contained that terrifying majesty, like a supreme existence.

"In my opinion, the true spirit is a special will, fusing the true spirit, the attack contains the power of the will, and the power will become more terrifying!

Ye Tian guessed.

Although he has only begun to fuse his will, his strength is more than ten times stronger than himself at the time of the Heavenly Monarch, if he continues to fuse, when he completes the ten percent fusion and enters the True Monarch level, his strength will reach a new height again.

At this moment, even Ye Tian himself didn't know how powerful he was.

"Maybe it's time to find someone to try your strength!"

Ye Tian said coldly.
